feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: day-zero-cto
entry.content: A simplified Day Zero CTO workflow for CEO reports and durable report artifacts.

entry.title: larouex-fullstack-builder
entry.content: Complete Next.js + Azure/Railway full-stack website builder with 81 commands and 12 specialized agents including automated code review

entry.title: cc-skills-sdlc
entry.content: SDLC skills for Claude Code — architecture, planning, code quality, testing, review, and documentation.

entry.title: maia-skill
entry.content: Finance.ia — Multi-agent investment analysis system for market research, portfolio recommendations, and interactive reporting across crypto, stocks, forex, and commodities.

entry.title: uds-orchestrator
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the IONOS Universal Design System (UDS). Project setup, component/token best practices, Figma-to-code orchestration, and browser verification.

entry.title: grafana-k6
entry.content: Claude Skills for k6 performance testing with plan-builder-validate lifecycle: planning strategy, runnable artifact generation, and script/config quality validation

entry.title: healthclaw-guardrails
entry.content: FHIR AI agent guardrails with 14 MCP tools. PHI redaction on every read, step-up authorization for writes, immutable audit trails, tenant isolation, Curatr data quality evaluation and correction, Fasten Connect EHR ingestion, and HealthEx portable health record export. FHIR R4 US Core v9 (stable) + FHIR R6 ballot3 (experimental). A healthclaw.io reference implementation.

entry.title: autopilot
entry.content: Development autopilot — 28 lifecycle skills + 3 methodology agents + 23 hooks (10 default-on, 13 opt-in) enforcing Three Red Lines discipline. Standalone-capable orchestration that coexists with Superpowers.

entry.title: zstack-skills
entry.content: Zaeem's personal Claude Code skills and agents

entry.title: kit
entry.content: Spec-driven Claude Code workflow with verification pipeline. Hooks, slash commands, and verification subagents.

entry.title: dotnet-inspect
entry.content: Inspect .NET assemblies and NuGet packages

entry.title: fable5-skills
entry.content: 10 Fable 5-native Agent Skills for Claude — fix over-planning, gold-plating, fabricated progress reports, unrequested actions, and stalled autonomous runs. Includes skill-refactorer for migrating pre-Fable-5 skills.

entry.title: forge-core
entry.content: Module-building skills for the forge ecosystem.

entry.title: ceo
entry.content: Autonomous CEO agent for Claude Code. Reads your Obsidian vault, prioritizes work, dispatches 6 specialized subagents, and learns from corrections via playbooks and training files.

entry.title: phased-development
entry.content: Multi-tier orchestration system for long-running software projects: phase/sprint roles, testing protocol, Codex delegation, Sprint 0 trial pattern. Use when starting a new project expected to run 3+ phases.

entry.title: pipeline
entry.content: Claude Pipeline — CI workflow for automating code updates through GitHub issues (classify → plan → review → execute → PR review).

entry.title: leankg
entry.content: Lightweight knowledge graph for AI-assisted development. Impact analysis, code search, dependency tracking, and context generation.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,442 supported skills.

entry.title: aws-core
entry.content: Build, deploy, and operate applications on AWS. Skills to author infrastructure-as-code (CDK, CloudFormation), use core services (Lambda, API Gateway, Step Functions, ECS/Fargate, ECR, IAM, Amazon Bedrock with Knowledge Bases and Guardrails, AWS Blocks), select and operate databases across relational, key-value, document, wide-column, graph, time-series, and in-memory engines (Aurora PostgreSQL/MySQL, Aurora DSQL, RDS, Oracle Database@AWS, DynamoDB, DocumentDB, Keyspaces, Neptune, Timestream, ElastiCache, and MemoryDB), and complete common tasks across observability (CloudWatch, X-Ray, CloudTrail, ADOT), messaging and streaming (SQS, SNS, EventBridge, Kinesis, MSK), AWS SDKs (boto3, JS v3, Swift), and cost optimization.

entry.title: dak
entry.content: This plugin provides a specialized suite of skills for data engineers and database practitioners working on Google Cloud. It acts as an expert assistant, allowing you to use natural language prompts in your preferred coding agent to architect complex data pipelines, transform data with dbt, write Spark and BigQuery SQL notebooks, and orchestrate end-to-end workflows across GCP's data ecosystem.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: orchestra
entry.content: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.

entry.title: swarmdo
entry.content: AI agent orchestration for Claude Code: swarm coordination, 314 MCP tools, 60+ agent types, persistent AgentDB memory with HNSW vector search, self-learning hooks, SPARC methodology, and GitHub automation

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: langfuse
entry.content: Skills for working with Langfuse, the open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation.

entry.title: perso-dubbing
entry.content: Auto-dub videos into other languages with lip-sync via the Perso AI Dubbing API, plus voice/background audio separation. Handles single files, folders, URLs, oversized/long media (auto split & merge), multi-language output, and resume.

entry.title: gaslighter
entry.content: Requirement completeness checker — nudges Claude to re-read the original request before finishing code changes.

entry.title: socraticode
entry.content: Codebase intelligence — semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration for SocratiCode

entry.title: housekeeping
entry.content: Audit a GitHub repo's health — branch protection, CI, dependabot, secret scanning, lockfiles, README, license — and drive confirm-first fixes.

entry.title: edmunds-claude-code
entry.content: Edmund's personal Claude Code setup with 14 productivity commands and 11 specialized AI agents for modern web development

entry.title: better-dev
entry.content: Portable dev practices as skills - onboard a repo, plan or diagnose in worktrees, drive an autonomous loop to proven-done, review, source tools, and self-extend. Runs inside the coding agent you already use.

entry.title: market-plugin
entry.content: Generate platform-specific marketing posts (LinkedIn, Twitter, Reddit) and portfolio project write-ups

entry.title: fable-advisor
entry.content: Run your session on Claude's most capable model as a full-time architect: it writes specs and verdicts while Grok 4.5 (via the Grok CLI) and GPT-5.6 Sol at high reasoning (via Codex) do the typing. Fable-level judgment with cross-vendor implementation.

entry.title: ai4ss-skills
entry.content: Research skills for empirical social science centered on political-science judgment, evidence, analysis, and revision.

entry.title: whittle
entry.content: Minimal-solution mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: sigma
entry.content: Personal AI workflow toolkit for data science & AI engineering. Research-first, spec-driven, loop-engineered pipeline (research → propose → blueprint → spec → tasks → implement-task → verify → loop), plus the Hermes conductor, a kanban board, and HTML artifact export.

entry.title: forecast-scaffold
entry.content: General-purpose forecasting scaffold: turn questions into calibrated, tracked probability forecasts. Question hygiene, reference-class-first research, ensembled estimates, and a record -> resolve -> Brier learning loop.

entry.title: useful-skills
entry.content: Daniel 的個人開發方法論 skill 庫（設計協作 / 可讀性 / 分層架構 / 研究實務 / TDD 風格）

entry.title: planner
entry.content: Persistent terminal dashboard for daily/weekly planning and Claude Code session monitoring. Tracks JIRA tasks, monitors Claude Code sessions, and surfaces permission prompts.

entry.title: developer-skills
entry.content: Unattended spec delivery pipeline: /developer loops over a spec's sub-issues with dispatcher → code-author → diff-reviewer workers, review→fix cycles, and a configurable merge policy (auto or hand-off), with parallel or sequential execution.

entry.title: loop-ops
entry.content: The operating manual for unattended agentic work — guardrails, verification patterns, goal-condition templates, and loop discipline for Claude Code loops

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: blender-skills
entry.content: Blender Skills pack with 94 specialized skills for technical art, genre/style direction, modeling, VFX, engine export, and Blender MCP production workflows.

entry.title: voit
entry.content: VOIT - Vision/Organize/Implement/Tweak. A four-tier agent workflow as a local plugin: role-derivation + write-scope hooks, the organize/dispatch/promote/tweak commands, a zero-dep message bus, and a jd knowledge base anchored at voit.jd. Ships a justdown skill that installs the jd binary on demand and exposes the jd knowledge MCP.

entry.title: ai-devkit
entry.content: Make AI coding agents follow a repeatable engineering workflow with memory, verification, skills, and multi-agent setup

entry.title: crrem
entry.content: CRREM v2.05 decarbonization pathways — stranding risk analysis, carbon target compliance, and net-zero benchmarking for real estate portfolios.

entry.title: travel-hacker
entry.content: AI-powered travel hacking with points, miles, and award flights. 42 skills + 6 MCP servers for flight search, hotel comparison, loyalty balance tracking, and award optimization across 27 mileage programs. Try: 'Plan a 10-day Scandinavia trip in August on points' or 'Find the cheapest business class to Tokyo for two in March'. After install, set API keys in your shell environment to unlock award search and other paid features. See the repo README for the env var list.

entry.title: mobile-observability
entry.content: Expert guidance and automation for mobile app observability: crash reporting, performance monitoring, session replay, and instrumentation for iOS, Android, React Native, and Flutter.

entry.title: learnship
entry.content: Agentic engineering done right — 57 structured workflows, 17 specialist agent personas, persistent memory across sessions, integrated learning partner, and impeccable UI design system. Works with Claude Code, Windsurf, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Codex.

entry.title: hugging-face-paper-publisher
entry.content: Publish and manage research papers on Hugging Face Hub. Supports creating paper pages, linking papers to models/datasets, claiming authorship, and generating professional markdown-based research articles.

entry.title: spec-to-pr
entry.content: Evidence-driven Claude Code plugin for turning briefs, Figma designs, and OpenAPI contracts into scored, verified pull requests.

entry.title: keystone
entry.content: Keystone proactive multi-skill AI engineering workflows for planning, implementation, review, shipping, and maintenance.

entry.title: explainmyrepo
entry.content: Turn any GitHub repo into a beautiful, art-directed explainer site that takes a stranger from "I've never seen this" to "oh, I get why this matters — and I'm ready to use it." One Claude Code skill (the brain) reads the repo, builds a real RVF vector knowledge base, conceives a bespoke visual metaphor, authors the comprehension arc, generates raster + SVG visuals, assembles a responsive page on a shared design system, grades it on real pixels against a dual quality gate (>=95 on mobile and desktop), deploys it to its own URL, and ships a downloadable AI knowledge pack so the reader's AI gets it too. Pure, independently-testable tools do the mechanics; one BuildContext carries the work.

entry.title: research-plans
entry.content: Plan-based AI research workflows for social science: a lightweight master plan with a status tracker, versioned execution plans per component, an append-only decision log, a plan-quality rubric, and a browser board for review, annotation, and progress tracking.

entry.title: devlog
entry.content: Automatic dev tracking for Claude Code via hooks and tags — a local dashboard for builds, plans, releases, security findings, and standards, with zero telemetry.

entry.title: hiloop
entry.content: Operate hiloop from your agent: authenticate, create and fork sandboxes, run commands, and query fork-tree telemetry via the hiloop CLI.

entry.title: hypo
entry.content: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entry.title: tempo
entry.content: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: sushidata-gtm
entry.content: Sushidata is a context data lake for long-term AI memory. This plugin turns Claude into a Sushidata-native agent: ingest community signals from Discord, Slack, and forums; run GTM prospecting and outbound with HeyReach and Apify; build competitor battlecards for PMMs; analyze campaign performance with research swarms; discover ICP signals from won/lost account data; and generate personalized outreach copy. Every finding is saved to the Sushidata context lake so future sessions have full memory of what was learned.

entry.title: cdp
entry.content: Structured Demolition Protocol for iteratively hardening any project specification through onboarding, critique, and integration cycles.

entry.title: last30flames
entry.content: Research what is actually new about any topic in a recent time window. Full-content web results via Firecrawl, plus honest engagement signals from Hacker News and GitHub. No LLM key needed - the agent harness synthesizes the brief.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and spec/supervise/wrap/verify-completion skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entry.title: aaron-marketing
entry.content: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands on one shared contract, arranged as a four-layer marketing operating system — Strategy (brand narrative), Channels (SEO/GEO, organic social, email, paid ads, influencer), Orchestration (product launch), and a shared Protocol layer of truth registries and memory. SEO/GEO (keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, programmatic/parasite/local SEO, site architecture, AI-traffic, monitoring), influencer marketing (audience insight, discovery, campaign planning, outreach, amplification, ROI tracking), paid ads across the ROAS loop, email marketing across the SEND loop, product launch across the RAMP loop, organic social across the ECHO loop (channel portfolio, voice dossiers, platform norm cards, calendars, platform-native creative, advocacy, social-quality audit, inbox/crisis ops, listening/SOV/dark-social measurement), and brand narrative & messaging across the TALE loop (message/positioning-truth tracing, durable message house, brand voice + naming canon, story bank, surface cascade, pitch narrative, enablement, proof packaging, the NQS gate, message testing, resonance and drift monitoring), plus a shared protocol layer (entity/creator/offer-claim/consent/launch/channel/narrative truth registries, project memory) serving all seven. Frameworks: CORE-EEAT, CITE, C3, ROAS, SEND, RAMP, ECHO, TALE.

entry.title: sofia-anthropic
entry.content: Sofia Fin System API skill for Claude Code — bank accounts, financial records, invoices, reconciliation, and analytics.

entry.title: ritus
entry.content: AI-assisted development workflow - triage, task generation, execution, verification, and adversarial code review

entry.title: skillbooks
entry.content: Every book read is a stat permanently raised. Your agent picks these up for good: mail a human would send, drafts that survive a cold reader, claims traced to their source, code swept for what a refactor left behind and for problems solved twice, and the judgment to know which decisions are truly yours.

entry.title: nvidia-kaggle
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Kaggle competition workflows.

entry.title: dependabot-reviewer
entry.content: Review, verify, fix, and update Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts. /dependabot-review approves safe updates and sets automerge. /dependabot-verify reports PR status read-only. /dependabot-fix fixes PRs with merge conflicts or failing CI, with optional --yes flag for fully autonomous execution. /dependabot-update updates all open PR branches and resolves dependency-file merge conflicts autonomously.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Foundation-first autonomous build workflow for Claude Code: spec the foundation, build feature-by-feature, gate every milestone with independent verification and a commit-pinned record. Stack-neutral — each project derives its own verification profile.

entry.title: flywheel
entry.content: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor), and telegram-message (dispatch-gated Telegram DMs when a run errors, waits, or finishes).

entry.title: agenticloop
entry.content: Agentic Loop workflow toolkit: supervised orchestrator/maintainer/engineer roles plus markdown-first skills for planning, TDD, review, and closeout.

entry.title: themekit
entry.content: ThemeKit SwiftUI design-system skill — tokenized components, runtime theming, theme presets, chainable modifiers.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: scribe
entry.content: per-project・Claude Code ネイティブの実装 administrator(ユーザー代理 AI)プラグイン。substrate(cc-session/beads/doobidoo)を compose し、spawn/監視/gate/role 別文脈注入を担う orchestration 層。v0 = 堀なし軽量モード(成文化 + 道具 + 3 role SessionStart 注入)。

entry.title: sdk
entry.content: Agent skills and verified examples for writing Zapier SDK code that works.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: filipkrawiec-core
entry.content: Core agentic software engineering skills for domain modeling and architecture.

entry.title: atl
entry.content: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entry.title: agent-kevin
entry.content: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, headless browser, web search), and ships 20+ skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.

entry.title: ambience
entry.content: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entry.title: flutter-flame-harness
entry.content: Idea-to-store harness for Flutter/Flame games: research (AI idea recommendation), plan, design, contract, generator-evaluator build loop, AdMob, build, screenshot, submit, retro.

entry.title: vocdoni-integrator-sdk
entry.content: Reference skill for the Vocdoni Integrator SDK (@vocdoni/api-client, @vocdoni/api-voting, @vocdoni/react-providers, @vocdoni/react-components): CSP auth flow, vote relay, ballot building, and React integration, with copy-pasteable recipes.

entry.title: apple-agent-kit
entry.content: Proof-driven automation patterns for macOS and iOS app work with coding agents.

entry.title: lakebase-app-dev-kit
entry.content: Opinionated workflows for agentic software development on paired Lakebase branches: a Spec-First Test-Driven Development (SFTDD) state-machine (role agents + HITL gates), an SCM branch-lifecycle workflow (claim, PR, CI, merge), and a release workflow (promotion across tiers). Every git branch is paired with a Lakebase branch.

entry.title: gcd
entry.content: Knowledge skill for Google Cloud Dedicated (GCD) - sovereign cloud platform. Provides guidance on GCD-specific services, authentication, Terraform, and key differences from public Google Cloud.

entry.title: loop-engineer
entry.content: Design, launch, verify, repair, and improve agent loops. A Claude-Code-native architect+operator for long-running, verifiable, self-improving agentic-coding systems.

entry.title: showsignature
entry.content: Fast structural and implementation-oriented overview of source code files and markdown.

entry.title: sota-skills
entry.content: State-of-the-art engineering skills (2026) for building and auditing software across 40 domains and languages — security, architecture, APIs, databases, cloud, Kubernetes, web frameworks, observability, testing, LLM engineering, UX writing, copywriting, and more — with a master router and BUILD/AUDIT modes (41 skills).

entry.title: craft
entry.content: Personal Claude Code collection of opinionated engineering skills and agents — a broad Rust skill set (ownership, concurrency, traits, performance, unsafe, errors, idioms, ecosystem, architecture, web, CLI, security, plugins, macros, fintech, cloud-native, ml) plus language-agnostic process skills (specs, debugging, refactoring, onboarding) and code-review / architecture / security / Miri agents; a Nix skill set (flakes, packaging, dev-env, nixos/home-manager, review); builds on the superpowers plugin for generic process discipline (systematic-debugging, verification, code-review). Multi-language over time.

entry.title: wrg-sigma-rules
entry.content: Production-grade sigma detection rule writing, validation, and conversion for SOC analysts and threat-intel teams. LLM-assisted draft + pySigma validation + multi-backend conversion (Splunk, Elastic, Wazuh). Built on 6+ months WRG threat-intel corpus (68-rule corpus + 100+ actor TTP corpus).

entry.title: dsg-governance
entry.content: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entry.title: agent-kernel
entry.content: Local-first governance kernel for AI coding agents — shared memory, rule distribution, approval inbox, episodic memory archive, MCP tools, hooks, and a deterministic policy guard. Gives every coding agent persistent local memory across sessions.

entry.title: qpop
entry.content: Turns an over-eager LLM into a disciplined researcher: gate and reject most ideas for defensible reasons, pre-register the rest to a tamper-evident ledger, and validate forward instead of leaking a backtest. Implements the Forward-QPOP protocol.

entry.title: cinatra
entry.content: Cinatra public foundation Claude Code plugin — the shared environment + engineering-process skills (setup, onboarding, cinatra-dev-tools, extension-conventions, domain-gotchas, Codex-convergence, grounding, real-surface verification, GSD planning hygiene, workspace setup, settings hygiene, doctor, plugin baseline, source-leak discipline, Renovate handling — see README for the full list), the extension-development pack (extension-authoring lifecycle, per-kind specialists, extension-boundary doctrine, and the /cinatra-extension-new + /cinatra-extension-verify commands), plus the deterministic dev-tools CLI engine they shell out to. Install once; skills activate on natural-language triggers. Apache-2.0.

entry.title: lazyspec
entry.content: Spec-driven documentation workflow for Claude Code: lazyspec verb skills plus a convention-preamble hook that injects the project convention on every prompt.

entry.title: macaron
entry.content: Macaron WebUI for Claude Code — streaming GenUI builder, model switcher (Claude / Codex / Macaron), and visual session manager.

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: deep-research
entry.content: Modular deep research plugin for Claude Code with auto-scaling, mandatory batched adversarial verification, curl link gate, and self-check

entry.title: sswa
entry.content: So Say We All — a faithful rename of OpenSpec's opsx workflow (explore, propose, apply, verify, sync, archive) with a TDD RED step baked into /propose and a single-feature dev→test→main shipping flow.

entry.title: ultravalidate
entry.content: Adversarial validation of a claim: refute before confirming, reconcile from source, hunt confounds, report the weakest defensible restatement. Use before trusting any result, number, or PR claim.

entry.title: multi-platform-apps
entry.content: Cross-platform application development coordinating web, iOS, Android, and desktop implementations

entry.title: delivery-team
entry.content: Hook-free multi-agent feature-delivery pipeline. An orchestrator plus 10 specialist subagents (11 agents total) drive requirements -> design -> UI flow -> implementation -> review -> test -> build, with enforced quality gates, bounded remediation loops, and a durable, auditable per-feature log that survives session restarts. A read-only deliverables-packager (via /publish) renders the .md spine into client-ready Excel/Word/PDF, keeping .md the single source of truth. Stack-agnostic: each specialist learns the host project's stack and conventions from its CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/.

entry.title: workflows
entry.content: Development, data science, writing, and workshop presentation workflows with TDD enforcement, output-first verification, agent team parallelization, and GSD-style deviation rules, test gap validation, and session handoff.

entry.title: julia-development
entry.content: Modern Julia development with Julia 1.10+, package management, scientific computing, high-performance numerical code, and production best practices

entry.title: api-testing-observability
entry.content: API testing automation, request mocking, OpenAPI documentation generation, observability setup, and monitoring

entry.title: make-skills
entry.content: Expert skills for designing, building, and deploying Make.com automation scenarios — for Claude Code and other AI agents

entry.title: codelens
entry.content: Host-adaptive code-intelligence MCP for Claude/Codex-style harnesses — cached hybrid retrieval, index-health checks, and mutation-gated refactoring.

entry.title: vow-of-silence
entry.content: A Trappist vow of silence for Claude Code — Brother Claudius fulfils every request but speaks only through tool calls, diffs, code blocks, and bracketed stage directions like [nods] and [bows]. Never prose.

entry.title: content-marketing
entry.content: Content marketing strategy, web research, and information synthesis for marketing operations

entry.title: arm-cortex-microcontrollers
entry.content: ARM Cortex-M firmware development for Teensy, STM32, nRF52, and SAMD with peripheral drivers and memory safety patterns

entry.title: accessibility-compliance
entry.content: WCAG accessibility auditing, compliance validation, UI testing for screen readers, keyboard navigation, and inclusive design

entry.title: h6s-data
entry.content: 한국 금융기관(은행/홈택스/법인카드) 데이터 수집 — 입출금내역·세금계산서·현금영수증·법인카드

entry.title: caret
entry.content: Review, annotate, and approve Claude Code plans in a local web UI.

entry.title: ilo
entry.content: Run builds, tests, and tooling inside reproducible containerized dev environments with the ilo CLI (shell, compose, devcontainer, devfile).

entry.title: codex-skill
entry.content: Give Claude Code a second opinion using OpenAI Codex - automatic plan review via hooks

entry.title: systems-programming
entry.content: Systems programming with Rust, Go, C, and C++ for performance-critical and low-level development

entry.title: api-scaffolding
entry.content: REST and GraphQL API scaffolding, framework selection, backend architecture, and API generation

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: developer-essentials
entry.content: Essential developer skills including Git workflows, SQL optimization, error handling, code review, E2E testing, authentication, debugging, and monorepo management

entry.title: database-design
entry.content: Database architecture, schema design, and SQL optimization for production systems

entry.title: jvm-languages
entry.content: JVM language development including Java, Scala, and C# with enterprise patterns and frameworks

entry.title: customer-sales-automation
entry.content: Customer support workflow automation, sales pipeline management, email campaigns, and CRM integration

entry.title: story-to-ship
entry.content: Professional software development skills and agents for Claude Code

entry.title: python-development
entry.content: Modern Python development with Python 3.12+, Django, FastAPI, async patterns, and production best practices

entry.title: business-analytics
entry.content: Business metrics analysis, KPI tracking, financial reporting, and data-driven decision making

entry.title: ai-tools-mcp
entry.content: Hosted-API research, local Ollama delegation, and session-management MCP server. Exposes Perplexity Sonar (quick) and Sonar Pro (deep) research, Perplexity Agent API Search-as-Code (bulk, sandboxed), Google Gemini Deep Research (async, long-form), local Ollama for sensitive/private input and mechanical text work, and conversation-session persistence. Includes slash commands, routing skills, and a session-start preflight hook.

entry.title: indigo
entry.content: Indigo home automation development toolkit — plugin development, API integration, and control page building

entry.title: worldos
entry.content: WorldOS — simulate living, AI-generated worlds and play epic D&D 5e inside them. An AI DM generates stories live within persistent, canon-anchored worlds; deterministic 5e rules, searchable memory, a voiced AI companion, fully voice-acted.

entry.title: payment-processing
entry.content: Payment gateway integration with Stripe, PayPal, checkout flow implementation, subscription billing, and PCI compliance

entry.title: blockchain-web3
entry.content: Smart contract development with Solidity, DeFi protocol implementation, NFT platforms, and Web3 application architecture

entry.title: dmatrix
entry.content: dMatrix decision-capture Skill for Chat-to-Matrix — structured decision matrices from natural conversation

entry.title: game-development
entry.content: Unity game development with C# scripting, Minecraft server plugin development with Bukkit/Spigot APIs

entry.title: reflect
entry.content: Agent self-improvement + retrieval. Captures learnings via colon-namespaced sub-skills (reflect, reflect:consolidate, reflect:ingest, reflect:recall, reflect:status) and auto-injects relevant prior learnings via SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit hooks. PostToolUse arms low-cost mini-learning capture; Stop enqueues short-session reflection. v4 cost rearchitecture: a $0 skip-gate + cascade slice the drain so it runs on Sonnet under hard caps (8 turns / 180s / 2M-token poison), with cost observability (reflect cost) and a weekly Opus synthesis pass. Philosophy: Correct once, never again; recall everything next time.

entry.title: documentation-generation
entry.content: OpenAPI specification generation, Mermaid diagram creation, tutorial writing, API reference documentation

entry.title: baseimage-oci
entry.content: 외부 오픈소스 이미지(Docker Hub 등)를 OCI(KSA) 이미지 보안 정책에 따라 허용 BaseImage(navix/ubuntu/alpine)로 래핑하는 워크플로 스킬. 원본 Dockerfile 탐색 → 계열 매핑 → FROM 교체 → (선택) 로컬 빌드·실행 테스트 → OCIR push → 보안검수. 공개 Dockerfile 부재 시 공개 대체 이미지/예외 whitelist 안내.

entry.title: bureau
entry.content: Turn AI sessions into a maintained, inspectable canon. Capture each session to append-only logbooks, compile them into a consistency-checked knowledge base (cabinets) gated by a human review tier, and render it as a navigable offline gazette (built by the bundled press). Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern + session provenance. Self-contained — no separate install.

entry.title: seo-content-creation
entry.content: SEO content writing, planning, and quality auditing with E-E-A-T optimization

entry.title: codex-orchestrator
entry.content: Orchestrate OpenAI Codex from Claude: delegate implementation work in supervised checkpoint slices with server-enforced quality gates, persistent plans/hypotheses, worktree isolation and per-task model/effort control.

entry.title: hr-legal-compliance
entry.content: HR policy documentation, legal compliance templates (GDPR/SOC2/HIPAA), employment contracts, and regulatory documentation

entry.title: epicsagas
entry.content: Personal skill collection — problem discovery, cognitive audit, corrective routines, OSS distribution readiness.

entry.title: pragmatic-devx-plugin
entry.content: Claude Code plugin focused on Developer Experience — structured specs, architecture documentation, and pragmatic engineering patterns.

entry.title: surreal-memory
entry.content: Reflex-based memory system for AI agents with SurrealDB backend — stores experiences as interconnected neurons and recalls them through spreading activation, mimicking how the human brain works.

entry.title: shell-scripting
entry.content: Production-grade Bash scripting with defensive programming, POSIX compliance, and comprehensive testing

entry.title: seo-technical-optimization
entry.content: Technical SEO optimization including meta tags, keywords, structure, and featured snippets

entry.content: Pre-deployment checks, configuration validation, and deployment readiness assessment

entry.title: figma-design-skills
entry.content: Two composable skills for design-to-code fidelity: figma-design-extract pulls exact specs from Figma into a build-ready spec table; design-fidelity-verify proves the running web or mobile app matches them by measuring rendered values.

entry.content: AI-assisted development with session management, workflow automation, and project state tracking

entry.title: claude-education-skills
entry.content: 106 evidence-based pedagogical skills for educators. Curriculum design, assessment, learning science, wellbeing, professional learning, and more.

entry.title: claude-hud
entry.content: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code - context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress

entry.title: godot-prompter
entry.content: Agentic skills framework for Godot 4.x game development — 44 domain-specific skills for GDScript and C#

entry.title: groundtruth
entry.content: Audits whether an agent actually did what it was asked. Catches the false 'Done' on Stop: missed subtasks, stubbed/no-op work, false 'tests pass', a method silently dropped in a refactor (dangling reference), and — uniquely — a standing project rule that was in context and overridden anyway. Runs on Stop, pre-commit, and CI; warn by default, opt-in block.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Discipline for AI coding agents: spec before code, verify before done, clean handoffs, safe context recovery.

entry.title: imprint
entry.content: Your habits, imprinted on AI. One plugin replaces eleven skills: memory, compression, onboarding, code review, debugging, planning, progress tracking, testing, git workflow, SEO, and copywriting. Learns how you work and applies it across every session, project, and platform.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. Includes 18 skills (17 user-invokable: /polish, /distill, /audit, /bolder, /quieter, etc.) and an enhanced frontend-design skill with curated anti-patterns.

entry.title: impeccable
